definitions.text: To create. To build, construct, produce, or originate.
examples: We made a bird feeder for our yard.
I'll make a man out of him yet.

definitions.text: To build, construct, produce, or originate.
examples: We made a bird feeder for our yard.
I'll make a man out of him yet.
I made a poem for her wedding.
we service all makes and models
Q: What make and model of car do you drive? A: It's a Buick LaCrosse.

definitions.text: Past, present, or future target of seduction (usually female).
Mate; a spouse or companion; a match.
An agricultural tool resembling a scythe, used to cut (harvest) certain plants such as peas, reeds, or tares.
